response.original_title: Як добре, що ми їх не бачимо
response.overview: Two friends drift through Kyiv’s »yebenya« (Ukrainian slang: »the ass-end of nowhere«), hopping city trains, tracing smokestacks, and power lines of Ukraine’s wounded electrical grid, chatting about the (in)ability to cry.
response.title: Як добре, що ми їх не бачимо
